def solve(grid, k)
  count = 0
  m = grid.length
  n = grid[0].length if m > 0

  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n
      if grid[i][j] > 0
        sum = 0
        queue = [[i, j]]
        sum += grid[i][j]
        grid[i][j] = 0

        while queue.any?
          x, y = queue.shift
          directions = [[-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1]]
          directions.each do |dx, dy|
            nx = x + dx
            ny = y + dy
            if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && grid[nx][ny] > 0
              sum += grid[nx][ny]
              grid[nx][ny] = 0
              queue << [nx, ny]
            end
          end
        end

        if sum % k == 0
          count += 1
        end
      end
    end
  end

  count
end
